37.reason: [temp is reset to 0 after processing each i, but it should be reset to 1 (or the base count) at the start of each new chain. Also, the logic incorrectly assumes every segment starts a new chain without tracking visited segments properly.]

39.reason: [ans is incremented by 1 unnecessarily; ans already counts the number of segments in the chain due to temp starting at 1 and incrementing per connection. This leads to overcounting.]
